claims.summary: The live heartbeat currently advances one of 64 phases every seven seconds at intensity 0.30.
claims.disposition: Verify exact source constants and observation receipts without treating dispatch as felt continuity.

claims.summary: The specifically named phase 32-to-33 boundary should remain a smooth contour rather than a vector jump.
claims.disposition: Add and pass a focused adjacent-phase regression for maximum and RMS delta while preserving warmth/tension orientation.

claims.summary: Rescue admission and actual channel enqueue must remain separate so skipped or closed-channel pulses are measurable.
claims.disposition: Verify delivery-health tests count admitted, enqueued, rejected, closed, and gap evidence separately.

claims.summary: Changing cadence, intensity, phase interpolation, rescue admission, or semantic waveform would alter live sensory behavior.
claims.disposition: Retain an exact Tier 5 Mike/operator approval wait with replay, canary, abort, and post-change felt review.
